description.value: You surround yourself with disturbing illusions, making you look and sound like a bizarre, insane fey creature. You gain DR 1/cold iron against a single opponent until the end of the spell, or until you take damage. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Ultimate Combat.
